_comment: Auto-linting hook wiring (deterministic, never calls a model). This file lives at the agentic_eng artefact-library root. To activate it for a project, merge this 'hooks' block into that project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json), or symlink it. Paths use $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR; if the script lives elsewhere than the active project root, swap in the absolute path to hooks/lint-dispatch.sh.
